title: About — Jude Hill
description: Meet Jude Hill, a Eugene-based student designer and developer focused on clean, high-performance websites and long-term client support.

blocks.title: Hi, I'm Jude Hill.
blocks.subtitle: I'm a high school student from Eugene, Oregon who builds stunning websites that are fast and simple. Whether you're a small business, a creative, or just someone with an idea, I'd love to help you create something you'll love.

blocks.heading: How I work
blocks.body: Simple process, fast feedback loops, and clean handoff.

items.title: We talk
items.body: You tell me what you need, who it's for, and what success looks like.

items.title: I design + build
items.body: I work directly in the browser so you see real progress quickly.

items.title: We iterate
items.body: You give feedback, I ship updates, and we tighten things together.

items.title: You own it
items.body: At launch, the site and content are yours. I can stay on for support as needed.

blocks.heading: Outside the browser
blocks.body: When I'm not building websites, you'll find me flying FPV drones, making things in my workshop, or shipping Etsy orders.
